title: RetroFeVLC
subtitle: The powerful evolution of RetroFE — now with VLC, smart addons & next-level customization
whatis-subtitle: RetroFeVLC – The Fast & Powerful Retro Gaming Frontend
whatis-p1: RetroFeVLC is a modern, actively developed fork of the popular open-source RetroFE frontend, rebuilt with VLC media library support and optimized for Windows. It delivers a beautiful, highly customizable, and lightning-fast interface for launching and managing your retro game collection across 100+ systems.
whatis-p2: Born as an evolution of RetroFE, RetroFeVLC replaces the older GStreamer backend with VLC for superior video, image, and animated media handling. The result is a smoother, more stable, and visually stunning experience — perfect for arcade cabinets, HTPCs, or dedicated retro gaming PCs.
whatis-p3: It combines the deep customization power of classic frontends with modern conveniences and performance improvements that make setup and daily use a joy:
whatis-p4: Built-in GUI for easy configuration — No more editing text files for basic settings. Access Menus, Controls, Layouts, and more directly from the interface.
whatis-p5: Blazing-fast performance — Menu navigation is quick and responsive, even with large collections.
whatis-p6: Stunning 4K visuals — Full 4K support with customizable scale quality options for crystal-clear artwork and videos.
whatis-p7: Rich media & animations — Native support for animated GIFs and WebP images, plus major memory leak fixes for rock-solid stability.
whatis-p8: Advanced layout tools — Include files, variables, per-game personalized views, GameInfo stats (times played, most played games, etc.), and a clean single-game focus page.
whatis-p9: Dynamic playlists — Real-time “All Games”, “All Favorites”, and “All Last Played” playlists that update automatically (via external add-on).
whatis-p10: Powerful external add-ons — Including start.exe launcher with playlist management, settings, controls, and quick access to everything. Additional tools like marquee animation control, screen mirroring to marquee, layout creator/editor, menu hierarchy manager, and kiosk mode (launch directly from shell without Windows desktop).
whatis-p11: Navigation feels intuitive, layouts are flexible and easy to manage, and adding new systems or screens happens without crashes or headaches.
whatis-top-title: One of the Top Retro Gaming Frontends
whatis-p12: RetroFeVLC earns its place among the top 5 best retro gaming frontends in 2026, standing proudly alongside heavyweights like RetroBat (EmulationStation-based), LaunchBox/BigBox, PlayNite, and classic RetroArch setups. It offers a perfect balance of visual flair, speed, stability, and customization depth — ideal for users who want more than a basic launcher but less complexity than full cabinet-focused suites.
whatis-p13: Whether you're building a sleek home theater setup, a dedicated arcade cabinet, or just want the fastest and most enjoyable way to browse and play your ROM collection, RetroFeVLC delivers pure magic in a lightweight, portable package.
whatis-p14: Fast. Dynamic. Easy to configure. Built for retro gamers who love beautiful menus and zero hassle.
welcome-text: RetroFeVLC is a powerful fork of RetroFE that replaces GStreamer with VLC, bringing dozens of new features, a smart addon system, and a much more user-friendly experience.
layouts-text:
Extremely powerful layout engine with Grid menus, per-game layouts, 3D effects, variables, include files and built-in Options Menu.
The official Phoenix Theme is a complete demo that shows everything RetroFeVLC can do.
about-text: RetroFeVLC is a community-driven fork developed by an enthusiast. Fully open-source under GPL3. The goal is to make RetroFE even better while keeping it free and open for everyone.
whatsnew-3: Rock-Solid Stability (no crashes when adding screens)
whatsnew-11: GameInfo stats (play count, most played game, etc.)
feature-start: Intelligent launcher with System Tray, automatic sync of Favorites & Last Played, JoyToKey, SuperF4 and more.
feature-search: Lightning-fast game search (F11 by default) with full gamepad support.
feature-layout: Grid menus, per-game layouts, random slideshows, 3D effects, and built-in Options Menu.
feature-metadata: HyperSpin, MAME, truRIP + AI Genre Fixer and Metadata Regenerator.
quickstart-li1: Download the latest Full All Addons Include version
quickstart-li2: Extract the archive to any folder (e.g. E:\RetroFeVLC)
quickstart-li4: Right-click the Start icon in the System Tray → RetroFeVLC Options → Settings Editor
quickstart-li6: Start adding your own game collections
